mapper.select: SELECT a.wrk_mast_id , a.rsch_prj_id , b.prj_nm , a.rview_tmlt_start_dt , a.rview_tmlt_end_dt , a.prgrs_stat_cd FROM rp_pre_rview_mst a JOIN rp_rsch_prj_mst b ON a.rsch_prj_id = b.rsch_prj_id AND a.wrk_mast_id = b.wrk_mast_id WHERE a.wrk_mast_id = #{wrk_mast_id}

SELECT a.rview_targr_id , COALESCE(b.user_nm, '') AS rview_targr_nm , COALESCE(b.dept_nm, '') AS dept_nm , COALESCE(b.jbps_nm, '') AS jbps_nm , COALESCE(b.jbtt_nm, '') AS jbtt_nm FROM rp_pre_rview_opl_list a LEFT OUTER JOIN sy_user_info b ON a.rview_targr_id = b.user_id WHERE a.wrk_mast_id = #{wrk_mast_id} ORDER BY a.firs_reg_dts
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO rp_pre_rview_mst ( wrk_mast_id, rsch_prj_id, rview_tmlt_start_dt, rview_tmlt_end_dt, prgrs_stat_cd, firs_reg_pgm_id, firs_reg_dts, firs_reg_user_id, firs_reg_ip, fina_reg_pgm_id, fina_reg_dts, fina_reg_user_id, fina_reg_ip ) VALUES ( #{wrk_mast_id}, #{rsch_prj_id}, replace(#{rview_tmlt_start_dt}, '-', ''), replace(#{rview_tmlt_end_dt}, '-', ''), COALESCE(#{prgrs_stat_cd}, 'RP070010'), #{reg_pgm_id}, now(), #{login_emp_no}, #{login_user_ip}, #{reg_pgm_id}, now(), #{login_emp_no}, #{login_user_ip} )
ON CONFLICT (wrk_mast_id) DO UPDATE SET rsch_prj_id = excluded.rsch_prj_id, rview_tmlt_start_dt = excluded.rview_tmlt_start_dt, rview_tmlt_end_dt = excluded.rview_tmlt_end_dt, prgrs_stat_cd = excluded.prgrs_stat_cd, fina_reg_pgm_id = excluded.firs_reg_pgm_id, fina_reg_dts = now(), fina_reg_user_id = excluded.firs_reg_user_id, fina_reg_ip = excluded.firs_reg_ip

INSERT INTO rp_pre_rview_opl_list ( wrk_mast_id, rview_targr_id, rsch_prj_id, firs_reg_pgm_id, firs_reg_dts, firs_reg_user_id, firs_reg_ip, fina_reg_pgm_id, fina_reg_dts, fina_reg_user_id, fina_reg_ip ) VALUES ( #{wrk_mast_id}, #{rview_targr_id}, #{rsch_prj_id}, #{reg_pgm_id}, now(), #{login_emp_no}, #{login_user_ip}, #{reg_pgm_id}, now(), #{login_emp_no}, #{login_user_ip} )
ON CONFLICT (wrk_mast_id, rview_targr_id, rsch_prj_id) DO UPDATE SET fina_reg_pgm_id = excluded.firs_reg_pgm_id, fina_reg_dts = now(), fina_reg_user_id = excluded.firs_reg_user_id, fina_reg_ip = excluded.firs_reg_ip
